purpose: PRE-DECLARED un-curated validation universe. Frozen BEFORE seeing any results (pre-registration). Tests whether the curated-winners RSI2 result survives on stocks NOT selected for performance.
selection_method: seeded random.sample from a broad sector-diversified liquid US pool, excluding the 10 curated winners already used
honest_limit_unfixed: Removes SURVIVORSHIP bias only. Regime bias remains: same 2025-06->2026-06 window (one bull-ish regime). Full validation also needs forward/paper testing over future/other regimes.
